features.name: Excalidraw Sketcher App
features.description: An interactive whiteboard application powered by Excalidraw embedded as a Datagrok view, accessible from the Misc browser path. Allows users to create and edit hand-drawn-style diagrams directly inside the platform.
features.evidence_summary: The 'Excalidraw' app-role function and the changelog entry 'Excalidraw sketcher integration' share the same name root and directly describe the embedded sketching application.

features.name: Excalidraw File Viewer
features.description: A Datagrok file-viewer extension that renders .excalidraw files in-platform when opened from the file browser, without requiring a separate app launch.
features.evidence_summary: The fileViewer-role function declares ext='excalidraw' and description='Excalidraw viewer', clearly scoping it to file-based rendering as a distinct capability from the interactive app.
